content.title: Nanox Starts 2 Collaborations to Deploy Nanox.ARC in U.S.
content.summary: By Karen Roman Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (Nasdaq: NNOX) said it started two new collaborations to deploy its digital tomosynthesis system Nanox.ARC across the U.S. The first partnership aims to use 12 Nanox.ARC with Integrity Medical Service in Colorado, Wyoming and the western parts of Kansas and Nebraska, the company stated. The second collaboration will deploy […]

content.title: Casey’s General Stores Joining S&P 500 This Week
content.summary: Casey’s General Stores  the Iowa-based convenience store chain, will replace medical technology company  Hologic  in the S&P 500 before trading opens on Thursday, S&P Dow Jones Indices said late Monday.  Hologic is being acquired by affiliates of  Blackstone  and TPG Global in a deal expected to be completed on or about Tuesday.  Barron’s reported in October that Blackstone and TPG were in advanced talks to acquire the medical device maker, although the companies declined to confirm the talks.

content.title: Hologic CEO Steve MacMillan to retire after go-private deal
content.summary: The $18.3 billion acquisition by Blackstone and TPG is expected to close Tuesday.
